code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useEffect,useState}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const PreloadContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(undefined);export const PreloadProvider=_ref=>{let{children}=_ref;const[user,setUser]=useState(null);const[corporations,setCorporations]=useState([]);const[inventory,setInventory]=useState([]);const safeJson=async res=>{try{return await res.json();}catch{console.error("JSON parse failed, got",await res.text());return{};}};const refresh=async()=>{try{const userRes=await fetch("/api/user").then(res=>res.json());console.log("User API Response:",userRes);const user=userRes.user;const userId=user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.id;if(!user||typeof userId!=="number"){console.warn("User ID not ready yet, retrying...");setTimeout(refresh,1000);return;}setUser(user);const[corpRes,invRes]=await Promise.all([fetch("/api/corporations").then(res=>res.json()),fetch(`/api/inventory/${userId}`).then(res=>res.json())]);console.log("Full inventory response:",invRes);setCorporations(corpRes.corporations||[]);setInventory(invRes.items||[]);console.log("Inventory preloaded",invRes.items);}catch(err){console.error("Error loading preload data",err);setTimeout(refresh,2000);}};useEffect(()=>{refresh();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PreloadContext.Provider,{value:{user,corporations,inventory,refresh},children:children});};export const usePreload=()=>{const ctx=useContext(PreloadContext);if(!ctx)throw new Error("usePreload must be used within a PreloadProvider");return ctx;};
